seo.meta_description: Content Cucumber pricing. Dedicated writer plans starting at $590/month. Content Flywheel multi-channel plans at $1,000/month. Managed services from $2,500/month.
seo.og_description: Pricing for human-written content. Three plans: Starter ($590/mo), Content Flywheel ($1,000/mo), and Managed Services ($2,500+/mo).

form.subtitle: Tell us about your content needs and we will recommend the right plan.
form.trust_text: No commitment required for Starter. Try us risk-free.

data.title: Plans That Grow With Your Business
data.subtitle: Three plans. One dedicated writing team. No AI slop. No rotating freelancers. No per-word pricing.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: A dedicated writer for your brand. Unlimited requests, unlimited revisions.

plans.name: Content Flywheel
plans.description: Turn a short monthly interview into a full month of blogs, socials, emails, and video.

plans.name: Managed
plans.description: A dedicated account manager, writer team, and full content strategy.

data.title: Need Something Specific?
data.subtitle: Every plan can be paired with standalone services.

items.title: SEO & AI Search
items.text: Technical audits, content strategy, keyword research, and AI search optimization. Show up in Google and in ChatGPT.

items.title: HubSpot Marketing
items.text: Marketing automation, email campaigns, lead scoring, and CRM setup. We are a HubSpot Solutions Partner.

items.title: Case Study Writing
items.text: We handle the interviews, writing, and coordination across every stakeholder. You make the introduction, we deliver the story.

items.title: Live Event Content
items.text: Turn a 3-day event into 3 months of marketing. Video production, interviews, social content, and media outreach.

items.title: Research & White Papers
items.text: Data-driven research reports and white papers that position your brand as a thought leader. Written by humans who understand your industry.

items.title: Product Descriptions
items.text: SEO-optimized product descriptions, category pages, and ecommerce content for Shopify, BigCommerce, Magento, and WooCommerce.

items.question: What is the difference between Starter and Content Flywheel?
items.answer: Starter gives you a dedicated writer for blog posts and web content. Content Flywheel adds a monthly video interview that we turn into blogs, social media posts, email newsletters, graphic design, and video clips. It is a full multi-channel content engine, not just writing.

items.question: What does Managed Services include that Flywheel does not?
items.answer: Managed Services adds a dedicated account manager who handles keyword research, content planning, writer team management, and content scaling. It is for businesses that want a fully outsourced content operation without managing the process themselves.

items.question: Can I switch plans?
items.answer: Yes. Starter has no minimum commitment. You can upgrade to Flywheel or Managed at any time. Annual Flywheel customers can upgrade to Managed with prorated credit.

items.question: Do you use AI to write the content?
items.answer: Our writers use AI as a research and outlining tool. Every piece of content is written, edited, and quality-checked by a human writer. No AI-generated drafts are published without human editorial judgment.

items.question: How fast is turnaround?
items.answer: Starter requests are delivered in 24-48 hours. Flywheel content follows a monthly production schedule with weekly deliverables. Managed services follow a custom cadence set by your account manager.

items.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
items.answer: Starter has no minimum commitment. If you are not satisfied, you can cancel anytime. Flywheel annual plans and Managed agreements have specific terms outlined in your service agreement.

data.title: Not Sure Which Plan Is Right?
data.text: Book a call with our team. We will learn about your content needs and recommend the plan that fits. No pressure, no obligation.
